title: M9 base medium for bee gut bacteria
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"bfejt","text":"This protocol is used to prepare stock solutions for a M9-based ‘minimal’ medium containing trace metals, vitamins, and casamino acids. Pollen extract or other carbon sources can be added to promote growth of bee gut bacteria (proteobacteria).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
